title: ZUNPet
body:
# The "ZUNPet" mod

This mod added an instrument called "ZUNPet" into Minecraft.

## How to use

You can find the item in the **Combat Creative Mode Tab** or craft the item using **3 copper ingot and 2 gold** ingot in survival mode.

![Crafting receipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/862026ca806fce34328f5b1cb87aafe4f443d957.png)

Press and hold the right mouse button to play, you can **rotate** your camera to control the pitch.

## Supported versions

This mod curretly support Minecraft Fabric 1.19.2.
